## Checklist

- [ ] The tool is still a single, dependency-free `index.html`.
- [ ] No `innerHTML` / `eval` / `document.write` on user input.
- [ ] No new network requests are introduced.
- [ ] Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard, focus) still works.
- [ ] `README.md` / in-app **Library** updated if characters changed.
- [ ] CI is green.
